name: Romaine with Avocado, Radish & Orange
recipeIngredient: 2 Seedless oranges, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lime juice, orange marmalade, avocado oil, salt, and pepper in a blender. Process until creamy.
2. With the machine running, slowly add hot water and process until creamy. Set aside.
3. Line a shallow bowl with lettuce. Alternate circles of radish and orange slices over the top. Cover and refrigerate.
4. At serving time, peel, pit, and cut avocado into 1/2-inch dice. Add to the top of the salad and drizzle with dressing. Serve immediately, as is or tossed.
